title: block_kind canonical_id rename requires a file/data_path/array_key/schema_path cascade — unsupported by renameCanonicalId (deferred from FGAP-060/unit 2.3)
description: The FGAP-060 renameCanonicalId engine (commit 33b76a7, unit 2.3) supports 4 canonical_id kinds (item, relation_type, lens, layer) and THROWS on kind=block_kind. block_kind canonical_id rename is entangled with the block data-file basename, data_path, array_key, and schema_path: buildIdIndex (project-sdk.ts) resolves loc.block by the data-file basename, while config.invariants[].block / lenses[].target / lenses[].targets[] / lenses[].members[].from / hierarchy[].parent_block / hierarchy[].child_block reference the block_kind canonical_id. Renaming the canonical_id alone (config references only) produces canonical_id != basename, breaking buildIdIndex prefix-vs-block invariant + invariant/lens block-resolution. A correct block_kind rename is a coupled filesystem cascade: rename <old>.json -> <new>.json + schemas/<old>.schema.json -> schemas/<new>.schema.json + config.block_kinds[].{canonical_id,data_path,array_key,schema_path} + every config reference, keeping canonical_id == basename. Rare by design (DEC-0023: display_name is the relabel surface; block_kind canonical_id rename is near-never for settled conceptions). Intended outcome: extend renameCanonicalId with a block_kind cascade path (file + schema + array_key + config references, atomic) OR canonicalize block_kind canonical_id immutability post-authoring.

evidence.reference: renameCanonicalId throws on kind=block_kind (unsupported — filesystem cascade)
buildIdIndex resolves loc.block by data-file basename, decoupled from config.block_kinds[].canonical_id — the coupling a block_kind rename must keep consistent
DEC-0035 names block_kind canonical_id as a primary-key the engine serves; DEC-0023 makes display_name the cheap relabel surface; DEC-0013 edge model

impact: A block_kind canonical_id cannot be renamed through tooling; if ever needed it is a manual multi-file cascade. Low practical impact — display_name handles relabeling and block_kind canonical_id rename is rare for settled conceptions.
proposed_resolution: Either extend renameCanonicalId with a block_kind path that performs the data-file + schema-file + array_key + config-reference cascade atomically, OR canonicalize block_kind canonical_id immutability post-authoring (display_name only). Implementation specifics NOT prescribed (outcome-only); survey the data_path/array_key/schema_path/basename coupling first.
